original: This military outfit is reminiscent of those worn on Earth in the 20th century. It consists of a tank top, bullet chain sling, and baggy camo pants. The top is quite tight and deliberately accentuates any natural assets. A defensive layer of nanofibers has been woven into the entire outfit.
